description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
Around 6pm on September 2, 2025 a Nuro vehicle operating in manual mode was proceeding westbound in the left lane on 16th Street just 
past Potrero Avenue. A vehicle exiting a driveway to the Nuro driver's right attempted to cross both westbound lanes and enter an east 
bound lane in between sporadic traffic. The Nuro vehicle was unable to completely stop prior to making contact with the turning vehicle as 
it crossed the left most westbound lane. There were no injuries and minor damage to both vehicles.
Print
Clear Form
